issues.description: ReturnToHand action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may return' — should be optional. Missing 'optional':true property.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action has no corresponding text in card. Card only describes Counter trigger with conditional return + power boost. This effect is completely fabricated.
Target scope should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' (1 of your Leader OR Character), not 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader'. Semantics differ in scope naming convention.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] You may return 1 of your Characters with a cost of 2 or more to the owner's hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle.
